name: healthmate-ai
description: HealthMate AI - Smart Health & Lifestyle Assistant with Multi-Role System

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --workspace=backend && npm install --workspace=frontend && npm install --workspace=mobile
scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace=backend & npm run dev --workspace=frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=backend && npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build --workspace=mobile
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=backend && npm run test --workspace=frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=backend && npm run lint --workspace=frontend

author: HealthMate Team
